name: recoil_app_attract_fmv_on_deactivate
description: RecoilApp_AttractFmvState::OnDeactivate rewinds the embedded attract FMV script by calling zFMV_Script::BeginNow with destroyActions=0.
known_limits: VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through recoil_app_create_main_wnd; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the RecoilApp FMV state cluster.
